# ShareDuo

> ShareDuo lets you share HTML artifacts with anyone — no Claude account needed to view.

## What it does

ShareDuo is the easiest way to share a Claude artifact with someone who doesn't have a Claude account.
Paste or upload any HTML file and get an instant shareable link that works in any browser.
No signup required to upload or view. Free.

## Key features

- **View analytics** — see how many times your link was opened
- **Password protection** — optionally lock your share with a password
- **Expiry control** — links expire after 1 hour, 1 day, 7 days, or 30 days
- **Claude MCP integration** — push artifacts directly from Claude without leaving the conversation
- **No account to view** — recipients need no Claude subscription or login

## Who it's for

- Claude users who want to share generated HTML artifacts, games, dashboards, or prototypes
- Developers sharing HTML mockups and demos
- Anyone who needs a quick, temporary public URL for an HTML file

## How it works

1. Paste HTML or drop a .html file on shareduo.com
2. Optionally set a password and expiry window
3. Get a shareable preview URL — anyone can open it in any browser

## Claude MCP server

ShareDuo has an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that lets Claude push artifacts directly.
Claude can call `push_artifact` to upload HTML and return a shareable link without leaving the conversation.
MCP server URL: https://mcp.shareduo.com

## Links

- Homepage: https://www.shareduo.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/fiona331/shareduo
- MCP server: https://mcp.shareduo.com
- Contact: hello@shareduo.com
